sentences.english: It snowed a lot last night.
This morning everything was white and beautiful.
sentences.korean: 오늘 아침 모든 게 하얗고 아름다웠어요.

sentences.english: I made a snowman in front of my house with my brother.
We also had a snowball fight.
After playing outside, we went inside and drank hot cocoa.
sentences.korean: 밖에서 놀고 나서 안에 들어가 핫코코아를 마셨어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
